title: Housekeeping
description: Professional housekeeping and janitorial services maintaining the highest hygiene standards across corporate, industrial, and institutional spaces.
shortDescription: Professional cleaning and janitorial services for spotless facilities.

title: Front Office / Help Desk
description: Trained front office personnel delivering a professional first impression — reception management, visitor handling, and help desk support.
shortDescription: Professional reception and help desk management services.

title: Horticulture
description: Expert gardening and landscape management services to maintain beautiful, green, and sustainable environments for your facilities.
shortDescription: Gardening and landscape management for green spaces.

title: Waste Management
description: Comprehensive waste management using source segregation, organic composting, and tech-driven SOPs to achieve sustainable outcomes.
shortDescription: Sustainable waste segregation, composting, and disposal solutions.

title: Facade Cleaning
description: Specialized external building facade cleaning using advanced equipment and techniques to maintain pristine building exteriors.
shortDescription: External building cleaning with specialized equipment.

title: Pest Control
description: Integrated pest management solutions using safe, approved chemicals and techniques to eliminate and prevent pest infestations.
shortDescription: Integrated pest management with safe, approved methods.

title: Guest House Management
description: End-to-end guest house and accommodation management ensuring comfort, cleanliness, and hospitality for corporate guests.
shortDescription: Complete guest house operations and hospitality management.

title: Pantry Management
description: Professional pantry and cafeteria management ensuring hygienic food handling, timely service, and a comfortable break experience.
shortDescription: Hygienic pantry and cafeteria operations management.

title: Office Assistance
description: Trained office assistants handling administrative, logistics, and operational support tasks to keep your office running smoothly.
shortDescription: Admin, logistics and operational support for smooth office functioning.

title: Mechanical & Electrical Maintenance
description: Preventive and corrective maintenance of mechanical and electrical systems to ensure uninterrupted facility operations.
shortDescription: Preventive and corrective MEP maintenance for facility uptime.

title: Payroll Management
description: Accurate and compliant payroll processing with statutory deductions, benefit administration, and timely MIS reporting.
shortDescription: Accurate payroll processing with statutory compliance.

title: Contract Staffing
description: End-to-end contract staffing — from recruitment to deployment, BGV, onboarding, and ongoing compliance management.
shortDescription: End-to-end contract staffing and workforce deployment solutions.

title: Security Services
description: Trained security personnel for guarding, patrolling, and electronic surveillance to protect your facility and assets.
shortDescription: Trained security guards, patrolling, and electronic surveillance.
